parameters.query:
SELECT
  b.id AS booking_id,
  b.booking_code,
  b.client_id,
  b.guest_name,
  b.email,
  b.deposit_required_cents,
  b.total_amount_cents,
  b.payment_status,
  p.id AS payment_row_id,
  p.checkout_url AS existing_checkout_url,
  p.stripe_checkout_session_id AS existing_session_id
FROM bookings b
JOIN clients c ON c.id = b.client_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT id, checkout_url, stripe_checkout_session_id
  FROM payments
  WHERE booking_id = b.id
    AND payment_kind = $2::payment_kind
    AND status IN ('checkout_created', 'pending')
    AND checkout_url IS NOT NULL
    AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW())
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) p ON true
WHERE b.id = $1::uuid;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, reused: true, booking_id: $json.booking_id, payment_kind: $('Code - Parse Request').first().json.payment_kind, checkout_url: $json.existing_checkout_url, stripe_checkout_session_id: $json.existing_session_id }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE bookings
SET payment_status = 'payment_link_sent',
    metadata = COALESCE(metadata, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
      'payment_link', $2,
      'last_checkout_session_id', $3,
      'last_payment_kind', $4
    )
WHERE id = $1::uuid;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Code - Stripe Create Session').first().json.booking_id }},{{ $('Code - Stripe Create Session').first().json.checkout_url }},{{ $('Code - Stripe Create Session').first().json.stripe_checkout_session_id }},{{ $('Code - Stripe Create Session').first().json.payment_kind }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, reused: false, booking_id: $('Code - Stripe Create Session').first().json.booking_id, payment_kind: $('Code - Stripe Create Session').first().json.payment_kind, amount_due_cents: $('Code - Stripe Create Session').first().json.amount_due_cents, checkout_url: $('Code - Stripe Create Session').first().json.checkout_url, stripe_checkout_session_id: $('Code - Stripe Create Session').first().json.stripe_checkout_session_id, payment_id: $json.payment_id }) }}

parameters.content:
## Phase 2b — Create Payment Session

- deposit_only amount: `deposit_required_cents` **only if > 0**, else `STRIPE_DEFAULT_DEPOSIT_CENTS` (20000)
- Stripe via **this.helpers.httpRequest** (no fetch/URLSearchParams)
- `stripe_payment_intent_id` set by webhook after pay
